programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.sub-title: Oily To Bed, Oily To Rise
programme.desc: The Stooges are tramps looking for handouts. Although the boys are down and out, Curly seems to get everything he wishes for. After some trouble with a farmer, the boys come across an abandoned car, one of Curly's wishes. The car actually belongs to some con men who have just gypped the widow Jenkins out of her land. The boys wind up at the Mrs. Jenkins house just in time for a free meal. To repay Mrs. Jenkins the boys try to fix her well and instead unleash an oil geyser. Learning that Mrs. Jenkins has been swindled, the boys go to retrieve the deed before it can be recorded. They find the bad guys and after a wild fight recover the deed. The boys return the deed to Mrs. Jenkins and marry her daughters; April, May and June.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.desc: The Stooges are singing waiters who are enlisted by a doctor to try and cheer up a little girl. It seems that the girl's father is a banker who was kidnapped with $300,000 worth of bonds. Failing to cheer up the girl, the Stooges go out looking for the father and by a series of coincidences wind up in the bad guys hideout. The villains return and after a wild fight the boys free the missing man.

programme.title: Friends With Money
programme.desc: Three well-heeled married women and their single, financially challenged friend negotiate the waters of friendship, relationships, careers and money.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A Hawaiian island playboy has to use his imagination to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory. Every night he is erased from her memory so he has to make her fall in love with him all over again the next day...and the next...and the next!

programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Friends With Money
programme.desc: Three well-heeled married women and their single, financially challenged friend negotiate the waters of friendship, relationships, careers and money.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A Hawaiian island playboy has to use his imagination to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory. Every night he is erased from her memory so he has to make her fall in love with him all over again the next day...and the next...and the next!

programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Holmes And Watson
programme.desc: A humorous take on Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.
